input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.10.1.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.10.1.2
            TITLE: design of the accumulator container must be documented in the ses.

            CONTENT:
            rule F.10.1.2: Design of the Accumulator Container must be documented in the SES.
F.10.1.2 Design of the Accumulator Container must be documented in the SES.   
Documentation includes materials used, drawings/images, fastener locations, cell/segment 
weight and cell/segment position.

final_answer: Design of the Accumulator Container must be documented in the SES. Documentation includes materials used, drawings/images, fastener locations, cell/segment weight and cell/segment position.
